name: banking
description: Jurisdiction-aware banking regulatory domain agent. 17 skills (1 router + 16 products) across IFRS 9 ECL, Basel III/IV capital and liquidity, AML/KYC/sanctions, and bank reconciliation. 7 jurisdiction overlays, 4 commands, hooks, and eval harness. Covers UK, EU, US, Australia, Singapore, UAE, and Pakistan.
